taskSummary: Fix the Home Office brand variant so the home page hero uses Home Office purple and hero breadcrumb links render white while ordinary content links keep GOV.UK link blue.

correctedBranchBehaviour.summary: Direct-main follow-up commits were reverted through PR #378. The intended implementation was reapplied on the approved fix branch for PR #379.

selectedBundles.reason: Repository safety, branch discipline, PR management, CI and automated review comment handling.
ResearchOps platform CSS, generated output and test-contract boundaries.
GOV.UK component, link, colour and accessibility treatment.

skippedBundles.reason: No Worker, Pages routing or deployment code changed.
No OpenAI API or model integration changed.
No MCP protocol or tool contract changed.
No Airtable schema or API behaviour changed.

precedenceDecisions.decision: GitHub Diamond governed repository mutation and PR readiness before convenience or visual implementation goals.
ResearchOps Developer Control governed the correct implementation layer: Home Office brand Sass plus generated CSS.
GOV.UK Design System governed the component and link colour boundary.

implementationSummary: Set --govuk-brand-colour to Home Office purple in the Home Office brand selector.
Added Home Office brand-layer treatment for the home masthead, inverse home service navigation and home phase banner.
Added white colour treatment for hero breadcrumb links inside home and repository mastheads.
Preserved GOV.UK link blue for ordinary content links.
Regenerated public/css/brands/home-office.css from the Sass source.
Updated tests/brand-variant-route-state.test.js to protect the new contract.

affectedContracts: Ordinary GOV.UK content link blue preservation

residualRisks: Visual confirmation on the branch preview remains useful for home and repository mastheads.
Any future actionable Codex review comment must be classified, acknowledged, replied to and resolved only after the fix is present and validation is checked.
